fields.title: Memory domain errors
fields.description:
Create extensions/tau/src/memory/errors.ts with Schema.TaggedError domain errors:

- MemoryEmptyContent — content was empty/whitespace
- MemoryLimitExceeded — adding entry would exceed char limit. Fields: currentChars, limitChars, entryChars, currentEntries (readonly string[])
- MemoryNoMatch — no entry matched the old_text substring
- MemoryAmbiguousMatch — multiple entries matched old_text. Fields: matchCount, previews (first 80 chars of each match)
- MemoryDuplicateEntry — exact duplicate already exists (not a hard error, but a signal)
- MemoryFileError — IO error reading/writing memory files. Wraps underlying cause.

Use Effect Schema.TaggedError pattern. All errors should have a readonly _tag field.

Follow tau conventions: no 'any', strict types. Check existing errors in the codebase for patterns.

No test file needed — these are just type/schema definitions.
fields.notes: Implemented extensions/tau/src/memory/errors.ts with schema-backed memory domain errors. Used Schema.TaggedErrorClass because that is the available API in the installed Effect beta. npm run gate passes in extensions/tau/.
